title: Deer & Oak Large Cutting Board 38 x 25 x 2cm, Pre-Oiled Wooden Bamboo Chopping Board for Carving Meat, Fish, Vegetables, Fruits, Cheese, Bread
features: 100% ORGANIC BAMBOO: Crafted from premium bamboo, the Deer & Oak chopping board offers the durability of a butcher’s block with the lightweight, attractive design you want in your kitchen. Perfect for slicing meats, chopping vegetables, and more.

WATER RESISTANT & DURABLE: This wooden cutting board resists water absorption, reducing the risk of cracking or warping over time. While tough enough for daily use, remember to avoid the dishwasher to keep it in top condition.

HYGIENIC & LESS BACTERIA: Our bamboo chopping board is naturally non-porous and resistant to knife scars, making it a safer, more hygienic choice compared to plastic boards. Easy to clean, it’s ideal for food preparation in any kitchen.

DAILY MAIL & TIKTOK VIRAL HIT: The Deer & Oak chopping board, praised for its quality, was featured in the Daily Mail and went viral on TikTok. Discover why thousands trust our board for its durability, style, and top-notch performance.

ECO-FRIENDLY CHOICE: This large bamboo chopping board is not only hard-wearing and gentle on your knives but also a more environmentally friendly alternative to traditional wood boards. Perfect for eco-conscious cooks.

Bamboo is a sustainable, fast-growing material that's strong, lightweight, and perfect for kitchen use. Its smooth finish adds a modern to any space. Why Deer & Oak? Deer & Oak began in 2020 as a passion project, inspired by family meals and smart design. Named after the founders’ Kent villages, it blends practicality, style, and togetherness in every product. Why choose a bamboo chopping board over wood or plastic? Bamboo is durable and naturally antimicrobial. It's also lightweight, resists moisture better than wood, and is gentler on knives than plastic. How do you properly maintain a bamboo chopping board? Hand wash with mild soap, dry immediately, and apply food-grade mineral oil regularly to prevent drying or cracking. Avoid soaking and dishwasher use. Is a bamboo chopping board safe for cutting raw meat? Yes, but it’s best to use separate boards for raw meat and veggies to prevent cross-contamination. Clean thoroughly after use to remove bacteria.
